name: xoa-utils

metadata.name: xoa-utils
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
Topic :: Software Development :: Libraries :: Python Modules
metadata.summary: Xena OpenAutomation ANLT Utility provides a shell-like command-line interface for users to do ANLT tests interactively.

documentation:
![PyPI - Python Version](https://img.shields.io/pypi/pyversions/xoa-utils) [![PyPI](https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/xoa-utils)](https://pypi.python.org/pypi/xoa-utils) ![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/github/license/xenanetworks/open-automation-utilities) [![Documentation Status](https://readthedocs.com/projects/xena-networks-open-automation-utilities/badge/?version=latest)](https://docs.xenanetworks.com/projects/xoa-utilities/en/latest/?badge=latest)

# ANLT Utility

ANLT Utility provides an **interactive shell** for users to control Xena testers via **command-line interface** (CLI) commands to performance operations such as AN/LT testing and resource management in an interactive fashion.

## Installation
See [installation guide](https://docs.xenanetworks.com/projects/xoa-utilities/en/stable/getting_started/installation.html)

## Step-by-Step Guide

See [step-by-step guide](https://docs.xenanetworks.com/projects/xoa-utilities/en/stable/getting_started/step_by_step.html)

classes.name: xoa_utils.exceptions.exceptions.CannotConvertError
documentation: def __init__(self, string: str, choices: list[str]) -> None:
self.msg = f"{string} is not in the choices {choices}!"

functions.name: xoa_utils.cmds.cmd_worker.shell_complete
documentation:
Perform shell completion for the given CLI program.
Mimic of :func: asyncclick.shell_completion.shell_complete.

```
param cli

Command being called.

return

String after completion
```

methods.name: xoa_utils.cmds.cmd_worker.AutoCompleter.get_completion_args
documentation: Use the self.args to return a tuple of `args, incomplete`.

methods.name: xoa_utils.cmds.cmd_worker.AutoCompleter.format_completion
documentation:
Format a completion item into the form recognized by the
shell script.

```
param item

Completion item to format.
```

methods.name: xoa_utils.cmds.cmd_worker.AutoCompleter.complete
documentation:
Produce the completion data to send back to the shell.

By default this calls {meth}`get_completion_args`, gets the
completions, then calls {meth}`format_completion` for each
completion.

functions.name: xoa_utils.clicks.click_commands.management.connect
documentation:
Connect to tester

    <DEVICE>: The chassis address to connect. Address can be in IPv4 format (e.g. 10.10.10.10), or a host name (e.g. demo.xenanetworks.com)

    <USERNAME>: Username for port reservation.

functions.name: xoa_utils.clicks.click_commands.management.port
documentation:
Use port

    <PORT>: The port on the specified device host. Specify a port using the format slot/port, e.g. 0/0

functions.name: xoa_utils.clicks.click_commands.management.module_config
documentation:
Config module media

    <MODULE>: Specifies the module on the specified device host. Specify a module using the format slot, e.g. 0

    <MEDIA>: Specifies the media configuration type of the module. Allowed values: cfp4 | cxp | sfp28 | qsfp28_nrz | qsfp28_pam4 | qsfp56_pam4 | qsfpdd_pam4 | sfp56 | sfpdd | sfp112 | qsfpdd_nrz | cfp | base_t1 | base_t1s | qsfpdd800 | qsfp112 | osfp800 | qsfpdd800_anlt | qsfp112_anlt | osfp800_anlt

    <PORT_COUNT>: Specifies the port count of the module.

    <PORT_SPEED>: Specifies the port speed in Gbps of the module. Allowed values: 800g | 400g | 200g | 100g | 50g | 25g | 10g

functions.name: xoa_utils.clicks.click_commands.lt.lt_im
documentation:
LT initial modulation config

    Configure link training initial modulation for a lane.

    <SERDES>: Specifies the transceiver lane index.

    <ENCODING>: Specifies the initial modulation. Allowed values: nrz | pam4 | pam4pre

functions.name: xoa_utils.clicks.click_commands.lt.lt_algorithm
documentation:
LT algorithm config

    Configure link training algorithm for a lane

    <SERDES>: Specifies the transceiver lane index.

    <ALGORITHM>: Specifies the algorithm. Allowed values: alg0 | algn1

functions.name: xoa_utils.clicks.click_commands.lt.lt_inc
documentation:
Request increment coeff

    Request remote port to increment (+) an emphasis by 1 on a lane

    <SERDES>: Specifies the transceiver lane index.

    <EMPHASIS>: The emphasis (coefficient) of the link partner. Allowed values: pre3 | pre2 | pre | main | post

functions.name: xoa_utils.clicks.click_commands.lt.lt_dec
documentation:
Request decrement coeff

    Request remote port to decrement (-) an emphasis by 1 on a lane

    <SERDES>: Specifies the transceiver lane index.

    <EMPHASIS>: The emphasis (coefficient) of the link partner. Allowed values: pre3 | pre2 | pre | main | post

functions.name: xoa_utils.clicks.click_commands.lt.lt_no_eq
documentation:
Request equalizing to off

    Request remote port serdes to turn off equalizing on a lane

    <SERDES>: Specifies the transceiver lane index.

    <EMPHASIS>: The emphasis (coefficient) of the link partner. Allowed values: pre3 | pre2 | pre | main | post

functions.name: xoa_utils.clicks.click_commands.lt.lt_encoding
documentation:
Request an encoding

    Request remote port to use a modulation encoding on a lane

    <SERDES>: Specifies the transceiver lane index.

    <ENCODING>: Specifies the encoding. Allowed values: nrz | pam4 | pam4pre

functions.name: xoa_utils.clicks.click_commands.lt.lt_preset
documentation:
Request a preset

    Request remote port to use preset on a lane

    <SERDES>: Specifies the transceiver lane index.

    <PRESET>: Specifies the preset index. Allowed values: 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5

functions.name: xoa_utils.clicks.click_commands.lt.lt_trained
documentation:
Announce trained

    Announce trained to remote port on a lane.

    <SERDES>: Specifies the transceiver lane index.

functions.name: xoa_utils.clicks.click_commands.lt.lt_txtapget
documentation:
Read tap values

    Read TX tap values of the port

    <SERDES>: Specifies the transceiver lane index.

functions.name: xoa_utils.clicks.click_commands.lt.lt_txtapset
documentation:
Write tap values

    Write TX tap values of the port

    <SERDES>: Specifies the transceiver lane index.

    <PRE3>: Specifies c(-3) value of the tap.

    <PRE2>: Specifies c(-2) value of the tap.

    <PRE> : Specifies c(-1) value of the tap.

    <MAIN>: Specifies c(0) value of the tap.

    <POST>: Specifies c(1) value of the tap.

functions.name: xoa_utils.clicks.click_commands.lt.lt_status
documentation:
LT status

    Show LT status of a specified lane

    <SERDES>: Specifies the transceiver lane index.

functions.name: xoa_utils.clicks.click_commands.lt.lt_txtap_autotune
documentation:
Autotune tap values

    Autotune TX tap values of a specified lane

    <SERDES>: Specifies the transceiver lane index.

functions.name: xoa_utils.clicks.click_commands.anlt.strict
documentation:
AN/LT strict mode

    Enable/disable ANLt strict mode. If enable, errored frames will be ignored.
